543 T1D T1D_THPY_MIN (T1D) Therapy Minutes CHAR 4 Multistate supplement: special treatments and procedures - estimate of minutes of therapy until day 15.
544 T2A T2A_WALK (T2A) Furthest Distance Walked CHAR 1 Multistate supplement: walking when most self sufficient - furthest distance walked. 0 = 150+ feet, 1 = 51"-"49 feet, 2 = 26-50 feet, 3 = 10-25 feet, 4 = Less than 10 feet.
545 T2B T2B_TIME_WALK (T2B) Time Walked CHAR 1 Multistate supplement: walking when most self sufficient - time
